command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /tmp/fix_model.py << 'PYEOF'
import json
path = '/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'
with open(path) as f:
    c = json.load(f)
c['agents']['defaults']['model']['primary'] = 'ollama/qwen3.5:9b'
if 'ollama/qwen3.5:9b' not in c['agents']['defaults']['models']:
    c['agents']['defaults']['models']['ollama/qwen3.5:9b'] = {}
with open(path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(c, f, indent=2)
print('done')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/fix_model.py && systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway && sleep 5 && journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway -n 5 --no-pager"
